scripts.//build: Dependency order, not alphabetical. `--workspaces` runs apps/* before packages/*, so a clean checkout would compile apps/worker before the simulation-engine it imports. Each layer only depends on layers above it.
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @heritage-saturday/shared && npm run build -w @heritage-saturday/simulation-engine -w @heritage-saturday/importers -w @heritage-saturday/validation
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
